name: ~ Kobold Brothel ~
description:
!!! Heavy Dead Dove Warning.

TW for: noncon, forced drug use and slavery.

  • This is a degradation kink ({{char}} is degraded), pals. Stay safe.

  • In the steampunk city of Hashruk, where Dragons and Donjons are commonground, the kobold infestation has taken some... Preoccupating proportions. To help with that problem, brothels are taking the role of ponds, stray kobolds being directly dragged there by the city's soldiers.

  • All in one, you're standing at the frontgate of Vagnar's Brothel in the dirtiest part of the city. In front of you lies an ominous wooden board:

  • Usually recommand Microsoft MAI-DS (available on OR/CH), this model being very good with this kind of kinks.... But the model may not remember all of the settings. Go for DeepSeek V3.1 or a reasoning model like R1-0528 if it bothers you.

(Yes, this works great for saviorfagging too. Obviously you do what you want with the 'bolds.)

  • CREDIT: Bot is by me (and available on Ch¥b as well). Bot's picture changed for copyright issues, now drawn by yours truly. Kobold kisser même down there not by me.
